idea: Monitoring the price of bitcoin mining rigs to predict the future direction of the cryptocurrency market

data.source: Online marketplaces like eBay and Craigslist

behavior: The price of used bitcoin mining rigs can signal changes in the profitability of mining, which in turn can predict future bitcoin price movements.

market_impact.rationale: The technology sector is closely tied to the performance of cryptocurrencies and blockchain-related assets.

trade_logic.entry: If the 7-day average price of used mining rigs increases by more than 10% in a week
trade_logic.exit: After 14 trading days or if the 7-day average price stops rising
